cheswoldAllowedIps: Whitelist of IP addresses permitted to access the Cheswold scanner integration. Standalone security table.
cheswold_scanner: Maps scan device IDs to specific carers for the Cheswold scanning system. Related to carer.
cheswold_scans: Records individual scan events from the Cheswold system, capturing user identity, mapped carer, and scan status. Related to cheswold_scanner.
client: Core table storing all care recipient records including personal details, medical information, mobility aids, dietary needs, login credentials, and location. Central table referenced by nearly all operational and clinical tables.
clientAusIdentifiers: Stores Australian government and health scheme identifiers for clients, including Medicare, NDIS, DVA, PBS, and aged care numbers. Related to client.
clientBilling: Defines billing rate rules (by day, time band, and job type) for client invoicing. Referenced by clientBillingPick.
clientBillingPick: Assigns a specific billing scale to an individual client. Related to client and clientBilling.
clientCarerTags: Links client and carer tag combinations with a priority level, used for matching carers to clients. Related to client, carer, and tag tables.
clientChartList: Associates monitoring charts with specific clients over effective date ranges. Related to chart and client.
clientDetails: Stores extended client profile data including referral information, billing codes, invoice cycle, travel settings, and contracted hours. Related to client.
clientGoals: Records care goals set for clients, with timescales, themes, and review flags. Related to client.
clientInfections: Tracks infection episodes for clients, including type, causative agent, symptoms, and resolution dates. Related to client and clientInfectionsMcGeerSession.
clientInfectionsMcGeer: Defines the hierarchical McGeer criteria question and answer tree used to assess infection surveillance. Self-referencing parent-child structure.
clientInfectionsMcGeerResponses: Records selected McGeer criteria answers for a given assessment session. Related to clientInfectionsMcGeerSession and clientInfectionsMcGeer.
clientInfectionsMcGeerResponsesHistory: Audit log of changes to McGeer response selections, tracking additions and removals. Related to clientInfectionsMcGeerResponses.
clientInfectionsMcGeerSession: Records a single McGeer infection assessment session for a client infection, including syndrome category and criteria met outcome. Related to clientInfections and clientInfectionsMcGeer.
clientIreIdentifiers: Stores Irish healthcare and funding identifiers for clients, including medical cards, HSE IDs, LTI, and DPS scheme details. Related to client.
clientLinks: Stores short-lived verification codes used to link or confirm client portal access. Related to client.
clientPending: Staging table for client registrations awaiting approval, mirroring the full client table structure before promotion. Related to client.
clientPic: Stores references to client profile photos with date taken. Related to client.
clientPictureUpload: Stores raw uploaded image files (as blobs) before they are linked to a client profile. Related to company and location.
clientsSummaryProfileFundingSignature: Stores digital signatures captured on the client funding summary profile, with signer name and timestamp. Related to client.
clientTimeChange: Records requested or applied changes to scheduled visit times, including new dates, times, and notification recipients. Related to client, carer, and adminRecurr.
clientUkIdentifiers: Stores UK-specific client identifiers including NHS number, NI number, council tax reference, and insurance policy details. Related to client.
cm2000: Configuration table for integrating with the CM2000 electronic monitoring system, storing FTP credentials and agency settings per company/location.
cm2000Areas: Maps operational areas to a CM2000 integration instance. Related to cm2000 and area.
cm2000Clients: Maps clients to a CM2000 integration instance for electronic monitoring export. Related to cm2000 and client.
cm2000JobTypes: Maps job types to a CM2000 integration instance. Related to cm2000.
cm2000PlannedVisits: Stores planned visit records sent to CM2000, linking recurring schedules to CM2000 visit IDs. Related to client and carer.
cm2000Residents: Stores CM2000 resident identifiers and sync actions for client records. Related to cm2000.
cmAccountsLinked: Links multiple carer accounts together, typically for finance or payroll consolidation purposes. Related to carer.
cmAndroidUsers: Logs Android app version and device OS details for carers using the mobile app. Related to carer.
cmAssignedHours: Defines scheduled care hour allocations for clients by day, time, and job type with recurrence rules. Related to client.
cmAssignedHoursPending: Staging table for care hour allocations awaiting approval before being applied. Related to client.
cmAusStatementHistory: Stores Australian client budget statement history per invoice period, including opening/closing balances and subsidy totals. Related to client.
cmAvailability: Records a carer's single-day availability slots with start and finish times. Related to carer.
cmAvailabilityNoShow: Logs dates when a carer did not show for a previously recorded availability slot. Related to carer and cmAvailability.
cmBrowserLink: Stores short-lived browser authentication links for carers, used for passwordless or delegated login. Related to carer.
cmBudgetStatement: Stores monthly budget statement summaries per client, tracking opening/closing balances across care categories. Related to client.
cmCarePackage: Defines care package contracts available within a company/location. Standalone lookup table.
cmCarerAvailability: Defines recurring weekly availability patterns for carers. Related to carer.
cmCarerBank: Stores carer bank account details and payroll configuration including salary, pay cycle, and employment type. Related to carer.
cmCarerBaseLocation: Defines named base locations with coordinates for carers, used in travel calculations. Related to company and location.
cmCarerContract: Stores carer employment contracts with job type, pay scale, contracted hours, salary, and leave entitlement. Related to carer and area.
cmCarerContractArea: Links carer contracts to specific areas. Related to cmCarerContract and area.
cmCarerContractRequiredFields: Configures which fields are mandatory for each contract type at a company/location level. Related to company and location.
cmCarerPay: Defines carer pay rate rules by day/time band with flat and overtime rates, including effective date ranges. Referenced by cmCarerPayPick.
cmCarerPayCancelled: Defines the percentage of pay applicable when a visit is cancelled, linked to a pay scale and cancellation reason. Related to cmCarerPayScale.
cmCarerPayPick: Assigns a pay scale to a specific carer and job type over a date range. Related to carer and cmCarerPayScale.
cmCarerPayScale: Defines named pay scale groups for carers within a company/location. Referenced by cmCarerPayPick and cmCarerPay.
cmCarerPayScaleTravelRates: Defines travel reimbursement rates per transport mode for a carer pay scale over an effective date range. Related to cmCarerPayScale.
cmCarerPayScaleTraveTimelRates: Defines travel time pay rates for a carer pay scale. Related to cmCarerPayScale.
cmCarerWorkweek: Defines a carer's contracted working pattern by day and time per week. Related to carer.
cmCategoryPlansTable: Links care plan records to categories. Related to plan and category tables.
cmChart: Defines care management chart templates (e.g. observation or monitoring forms). Referenced by cmChartQuestions, cmChartAssign, and cmChartTaken.
cmChartAlertBaselines: Links chart baselines to alerts with threshold values and recommended actions. Related to cmChartAlerts and cmChartBaselines.
cmChartAlerts: Records alert events triggered by chart answers breaching configured baselines. Related to cmChart and cmChartQuestions.
cmChartAnswers: Stores individual answers recorded during a CM chart session. Related to cmChartTaken and cmChartQuestions.
cmChartAssign: Assigns a CM chart to a client with scheduling and recurrence rules. Related to cmChart and client.
cmChartAssignTimes: Defines specific time slots within a CM chart assignment. Related to cmChartAssign.
cmChartBaselineNumerics: Stores numeric threshold alert rules (above/below) for CM chart question baselines. Related to cmChartBaselines.
cmChartBaselineOptions: Stores option-based alert rules for multi-choice CM chart questions. Related to cmChartBaselines.
cmChartBaselines: Links a CM chart and question to a client, defining the monitoring baseline that drives alerts. Related to cmChart, cmChartQuestions, client, carer, company, and location.
cmChartQuestionAnswers: Defines selectable answer options for CM chart questions. Related to cmChartQuestions.
cmChartQuestions: Defines the individual questions within a CM chart template, including type, measure, and display order. Related to cmChart.
cmChartTaken: Records each completed CM chart observation session for a client, linking to the chart, carer, and assignment. Related to cmChart, client, and carer.
cmClientBank: Stores basic bank/SWIFT details for clients. Related to client.
cmClientBankDetails: Stores full client bank account details including IBAN, BIC, and sort code. Related to client.
cmClientBilling: Defines client billing rate rules by day/time band with flat and overtime rates and effective dates. Referenced by cmClientBillingPick.
cmClientBillingCancelled: Defines the percentage of billing applicable when a client visit is cancelled. Related to cmClientBillingScale.
cmClientBillingPick: Assigns a billing scale to a specific client and job type over a date range. Related to client and cmClientBillingScale.
cmClientBillingScale: Defines named billing scale groups for clients within a company/location. Referenced by cmClientBillingPick.
cmClientBillingTravelRates: Defines client travel billing rates per transport mode for a billing scale over an effective date range. Related to cmClientBillingScale.
cmClientChartList: Associates CM charts with specific clients over effective date ranges. Related to cmChart and client.
cmClientPay: Defines client-side pay rate rules by day/time band. Legacy or alternative pay scale table.
cmClientPayPick: Assigns a client-side pay scale to a specific client and carer combination over a date range. Related to client and carer.
cmClientPayScale: Defines named client-side pay scale groups. Referenced by cmClientPayPick.
cmClientWallet: Tracks client wallet transactions including deposit, spend, and balance, linked to expense records. Related to client.
cmComments: Stores comments written by staff about clients or carers, with edit and delete tracking. Related to client and carer.
cmCommentsGlobal: Stores comments against any entity table using a generic entity reference, supporting system-wide comment threads. Related to cmCommentTypesGlobal.
cmCommentsPending: Staging table for comments awaiting approval before being published. Mirrors cmComments structure.
cmCommentTypesGlobal: Defines named comment type categories applicable to specific entity tables. Referenced by cmCommentsGlobal.
cmCompanyBillingPick: Assigns a default billing scale to a job type at company level. Related to cmClientBillingScale.
cmCompanyClientPayPick: Assigns a default client-side pay scale to a job type at company level. Related to cmClientPayScale.
cmCompanyLogo: Stores company logo images as blobs with prefix and location context. Related to company.
cmCompanyPayPick: Assigns a default carer pay scale to a job type at company level over a date range. Related to cmCarerPayScale.
cmContractSettings: Stores per-carer contract configuration including holiday calculation method, TUPE status, entitlement days, and minimum hours. Related to carer.
cmContractsHours: Defines a carer's contracted hours per day of the week over a date range. Related to carer.
cmdailyTaskAssignNoShow: Logs dates when an assigned daily task was not completed for a client. Related to client and cmdailyTasksAssignTimes.
cmdailyTasks: Defines the master list of daily care tasks available to assign to clients, with category and theme. Referenced by cmdailyTasksAssign.
cmdailyTasksAssign: Assigns a daily task to a client with recurrence rules, scheduling days, and optional care plan linkage. Related to cmdailyTasks and client.
cmdailyTasksAssignPermission: Controls which carers have permission to complete tasks in specific categories. Related to carer.
cmdailyTasksAssignTimes: Defines specific time slots for a daily task assignment, supporting multi-time scheduling per day. Related to cmdailyTasksAssign.
cmdailyTasksCategories: Defines named categories for grouping daily tasks. Referenced by cmdailyTasks and cmdailyTasksResults.
cmdailyTasksClientTags: Links tags to daily tasks with a numeric quantity, used for task filtering per client. Related to cmdailyTasksTags and cmdailyTasksAssign.
cmdailyTasksFiles: Stores file attachments associated with daily task records for clients. Related to client.
cmdailyTasksReason: Defines reason codes for why a daily task was not completed, grouped by category. Related to cmdailyTasksCategories.
cmdailyTasksReasonCategory: Defines categories for task non-completion reasons, including colour coding and comment requirements. Referenced by cmdailyTasksReason.
cmdailyTasksResults: Records completed or skipped daily task outcomes for clients, with timestamp, outcome, and alert tracking. Related to client and cmdailyTasksAssign.
cmdailyTasksTags: Defines named tags used to label and filter daily tasks within a company/location. Referenced by cmdailyTasksClientTags.
